Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12466 0 0}Man, I'm stuffed after that meal... Maybe I'll run a couple laps.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}I wonder if someone new will compete this year, like a rival to get me fired up.[n]{f 1 1}
